---
name: Missing tag
about: Suggest to add a tag which is missing in this repo.
title: "[TAG]"
labels: ''
assignees: Lloyd159

---

**What's the name of the tag?**
The name of the tag including category. Example: `dad in category misc`

**What is the content of the tag?**
A link to the message send by the bot. Example: `https://discord.com/channels/302094807046684672/752025169048109067/1504861771725537291`

**Additional context**
Add any other context or information here.
